message:
test: add WorkflowBuilder and Nav tests

25 new tests covering workflow builder (empty state, title/description
inputs, add/remove/clear steps, search results, markdown export with
clipboard copy) and navigation (logo, nav links, search/basket
buttons, basket count badges, mobile menu ARIA, theme toggle, Go Pro).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
